embeds.title: Patient Zero (Story) ( -424)
embeds.description: This refers to Professor V and Nerd Duck, not Patient Zero. "Bringing them together" was done by the act listed immediately after, putting a shard in the toilet. Doing so caused T.D.S. to come there, bringing together Professor V and Nerd Duck. After they were brought together, they started messing with the fragments to create a partial cube, the main thing that caused Null & Void to happen and free Lord Exo.

embeds.title: Fog ( +30)
embeds.description: pretty close except the buffs, the way they are calculated is different \(if you take the example i listed, if you do like you said then it would be 11.5\*0.75, which would be 8.625, but of course in-game 10% Enhanced Optics only makes it 8. And no, it is not 7\*1.1 either, some values with the DJ Booth show that, a 15% buff makes the range 9, if you do 11.5\*0.65 then round it down to 7, 7\*1.15 will be 8, meaning it cannot be that either\)

embeds.title: Fog ( +90)
embeds.description: playtested some stuff and i think this is 100% correct.

embeds.title: Fog ( +618)
embeds.description: indepth explaination for Fog rounding behavior
